form.formComment: Was edged out last time at Ballarat when beaten just half a length but did clock a swift 22.17 over the 390m journey. Looks the one to beat with a repeat of that effort.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was edged out last time at Ballarat when beaten just half a length but did clock a swift 22.17 over the 390m journey. Looks the one to beat with a repeat of that effort.

form.formComment: Could manage only fifth last time but turned heads the start prior when he clocked a slick 16.80 over 300m finishing third at Healesville. Top run two back and has claims here.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Could manage only fifth last time but turned heads the start prior when he clocked a slick 16.80 over 300m finishing third at Healesville. Top run two back and has claims here.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (16.87) when third at Healesville in a Grade 4/5. Box stats strong with four wins and two placings from 10 starts. Looks a leading chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the frame latest (16.87) when third at Healesville in a Grade 4/5. Box stats strong with four wins and two placings from 10 starts. Looks a leading chance.

form.formComment: Nearing another win after his success on February 20 at Wagga over 320m. Last start was second over 320m in 18.61, behind Scott Shenanigan. Has the ability to be in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Nearing another win after his success on February 20 at Wagga over 320m. Last start was second over 320m in 18.61, behind Scott Shenanigan. Has the ability to be in the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Dwelt at the start; Came together at the turn into the home straight.

form.formComment: Found the going tougher last start when third over 390m at this track. That followed a win two back in 22.32 beating Surging over 390m at this track. In the money last time but this is a stern test.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Found the going tougher last start when third over 390m at this track. That followed a win two back in 22.32 beating Surging over 390m at this track. In the money last time but this is a stern test.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage sixth but before that won by 0.8 lengths at Warrnambool (22.37) beating Aston Fumiko in a Grade 5 on March 5. Tempted to look elsewhere.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Got back last start and could only manage sixth but before that won by 0.8 lengths at Warrnambool (22.37) beating Aston Fumiko in a Grade 5 on March 5. Tempted to look elsewhere.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and drifts back in his races. Last start finished fourth over 410m at Horsham, beaten 11 lengths. Hard to have this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and drifts back in his races. Last start finished fourth over 410m at Horsham, beaten 11 lengths. Hard to have this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Contacted approaching home turn.

form.formComment: Was big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, weakening late to finish a 2.75 lengths sixth (22.46) over 390m at this track. Capable of improvement on latest effort. Well placed and should feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, weakening late to finish a 2.75 lengths sixth (22.46) over 390m at this track. Capable of improvement on latest effort. Well placed and should feature.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th over 390m at this track beaten 6 lengths (22.21) behind Paw Estrella in a Mix 3/4 on March 30. Comes through a good form race. Looks a definite chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 4th over 390m at this track beaten 6 lengths (22.21) behind Paw Estrella in a Mix 3/4 on March 30. Comes through a good form race. Looks a definite chance.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in her races, Last start finished seventh over 390m at this track, beaten 4.5 lengths. Has failed to show enough to come into contention.

formComments.title: TAB
